page_metadata.biotools__summary: AI-Driver (AI-based driver classifier) is an ensemble method for predicting the driver status of somatic missense mutations based on 23 pathogenicity features. AI-Driver is an ensemble method for identifying driver mutations in personal cancer genomes.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: AI-Driver (AI-based driver classifier) is an ensemble method for predicting the driver status of somatic missense mutations based on 23 pathogenicity features. AI-Driver is an ensemble method for identifying driver mutations in personal cancer genomes.
